zh.lifeSummary: 當Susan Dowle於1576年出生在英國肯特騰特爾登時，她的父親Dowle27歲，母親Dowle27歲。她於1597年6月9日與Nathaniel Ely Sr.在英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1615年8月18日在她的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Susan Dowle于1576年出生在英国肯特騰特爾登时，她的父亲Dowle27岁，母亲Dowle27岁。她于1597年6月9日与Nathaniel Ely Sr.在英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1615年8月18日在她的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Dowle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dowell
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill (see McDowell ).
English: nickname from Middle English do well, do will ‘do well’. Compare Farwell 1 and Gowell .

variants.name: Doll
meanings: South German: nickname from Middle High German tol, dol ‘foolish, mad’; also ‘strong, handsome’.
South German (Bavaria): topographic name for someone living in a valley, Middle High German tol ‘ditch’.

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Susan Dowle was born in 1576, in Tenterden, Kent, England, her father, Dowle, was 27 and her mother, Dowle, was 27. She married Nathaniel Ely Sr. on 9 June 1597, in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 18 August 1615, in her hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Susan Dowle est née en 1576, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Dowle, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Dowle, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Ely Sr. le 9 juin 1597, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 août 1615, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Susan Dowle 1576 in Tenterden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dowle 27 und ihre Mutter Dowle 27. Sie hat am 9. Juni 1597 in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Nathaniel Ely Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. August 1615 im Alter von 39 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Susan Dowle è nata il nel 1576 nel Tenterden, Kent, England, sua padre, Dowle, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Dowle, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Nathaniel Ely Sr. il 9 giugno 1597, nel Tenterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 18 agosto 1615, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Susan Dowleが1576年にイギリスケントテンテルデンで生まれた時，父Dowleは27歳，母Dowleは27歳であった。1597年6月9日にイギリスイギリスケントテンテルデンでNathaniel Ely Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1615年8月18日に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Susan Dowle(이)가 1576년 영국 켄트 텐터든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dowle(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dowle(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1597년 6월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 텐터든에서 Nathaniel Ely Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 8월 18일 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Susan Dowle nasceu em 1576, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Dowle, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Dowle, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Ely Sr. em 9 de junho de 1597, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1615, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Susan Dowle родилась в 1576 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Dowle было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Dowle, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Ely Sr. 9 июня 1597 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 18 августа 1615 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

sm.between 1607-1615: mai le 1607 e o'o I le 1615

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Susan Dowle nació en 1576, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Dowle, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Dowle, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Nathaniel Ely Sr. el 9 de junio de 1597, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1615, en su pueblo, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
